personal.name: Shubh Shaguneet Singh
personal.bio: B.E. Computer Science student at BITS Pilani Goa Campus. Experienced in full-stack development, mobile application design, and research-focused software engineering for GNSS signal processing. Problem solver with strong fundamentals in DSA, DBMS, and Object-Oriented Programming.

education.institution: BITS Pilani, K.K. Birla Goa Campus

projects.title: GNSS Receiver Software Development
projects.description: Contributing to a government-sponsored research project developing Python-based software to process and analyze GNSS signals. Implementing algorithms to enhance satellite signal acquisition and positioning accuracy.

projects.title: Full-Stack Library Management System
projects.description: Developed a full-stack web application to manage the campus library with a MySQL backend. Supported book cataloguing, user management, and borrow/return workflows.

projects.title: Backstage Inventory Management App
projects.description: Built a cross-platform mobile application from scratch using Flutter to digitize the college auditorium's inventory tracking system, replacing error-prone spreadsheets.

extracurriculars.description: Managed deployment of large-scale stage setups and streamlined backstage operations for Quark, the annual technical festival of BITS Pilani Goa.
